name: SomeIpSerializeMessage
title: SomeIpSerializeMessage
syntax: dword SomeIpSerializeMessage( dword messageHandle, dword bufferLength, CHAR buffer[] );
description: Serializes a SOME/IP message into a data buffer. Both the SOME/IP header and the payload are serialized.

If the configuration of the SOME/IP message is invalid (for example, incorrect value in length field or invalid content of payload), the message is not corrected when serialized. The message is passed unchanged.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the message that was created with SomeIpCreateMessage, for example.

return:
Number of copied bytes.
In the Event of an error, the function returns the value 0. The SomeIpGetLastError function can then be used to check whether the value is valid or an error has occurred.
